Metadata.siteTitleDefault: Techbox | Software, cloud, and automation for SMBs
Metadata.siteDescription: Tech consultancy that helps SMBs in Costa Rica and Latin America build software, automate processes, organize the cloud, strengthen cybersecurity, and make better decisions with data.
Metadata.ogTitle: Techbox | Software, cloud, and automation for SMBs
Metadata.ogDescription: Software, cloud, automation, cybersecurity, and data for SMBs. Affordable pricing and free assessment.
Metadata.twitterDescription: Software, cloud, and automation for SMBs. Affordable pricing and free assessment.

Footer.tagline: Practical technology for SMBs. Costa Rica and the entire region.
Footer.madeWith: Made with care in Costa Rica.

Home.heroTitleAccent: for SMBs without an in-house tech team
Home.heroLead: We find what is slowing down your operation and fix it with technology that actually gets used. No jargon, no projects that drag on forever.
Home.valuesDesc1: No generic templates. We shape every project around how your business actually runs.
Home.valuesDesc2: We build on modern foundations so the software keeps up when your company needs to scale.
Home.valuesDesc3: We speak plainly, no weird jargon. Straight to the point and focused on real results.
Home.valuesDesc4: We measure impact in hours saved, errors avoided, and decisions made — not just deliverables.
Home.servicesDescription: We support you from the initial assessment to ongoing support, with services that combine to fit exactly what your business needs.
Home.whyLead: SMBs usually carry manual processes, systems that don’t talk to each other, and very little visibility. Without an in-house tech team, every technology decision feels risky. That’s the work we do alongside you.
Home.painPoint1: Manual processes that take hours every week
Home.painPoint2: Systems that don’t talk between sales, ops, and finance
Home.painPoint3: Little visibility into what is really happening in the business
Home.painPoint4: Cybersecurity risks without a clear plan
Home.painPoint5: No in-house tech team to lead the change
Home.solution1: Automations that give you time back from the first week
Home.solution2: Systems and data in a single view, no jumping between screens
Home.solution3: Clear dashboards for leadership and for the day-to-day operators
Home.solution4: Basic security controls that actually get followed
Home.solution5: An external team that fits in like one of your own
Home.useCasesDescription: Examples inspired by companies like yours. Each case combines several of our services depending on the problem to solve.
Home.processDescription: Few phases, measurable goals, and constant communication. That’s how we avoid the eternal projects that never deliver anything.
Home.step1Desc: We listen and look at how your business runs today, together.
Home.step2Desc: We put scope, timeline, and investment in writing before kicking off.
Home.step3Desc: We iterate with you, with short deliveries you can see and try.
Home.step4Desc: We deploy, migrate the data, and train your team.
Home.step5Desc: We stick around as the system goes live and evolves.

Services.metaDescription: Custom software, cloud, automation, cybersecurity, data analytics, and consulting for SMBs in Costa Rica and the region.
Services.titleAccent: for SMBs without an in-house tech team
Services.description: We blend engineering, data, and strategy to solve the real problems holding back your company’s growth. We support you from assessment to day-to-day support.
Services.ctaDescription: Book a free 30-minute assessment. We help you identify the first improvement with real impact on your operation.

ServiceDetail.examplesDescription: Real scenarios where this service delivers value from the very first weeks.
ServiceDetail.relatedTitle: Services that often go hand in hand

About.metaDescription: Techbox is a Costa Rican tech consultancy that helps SMBs across Latin America with software, cloud, automation, cybersecurity, and data.
About.heroLead: TechBox S.R.L. is a Costa Rican consultancy that combines software engineering, cloud, automation, cybersecurity, and data analytics. We work side by side with SMBs across Latin America that need to modernize their operations without complications.
About.cardCoverage: We serve SMBs in Costa Rica and across Latin America.
About.missionDescription: We want any company, big or small, to grow with modern, secure, well-implemented tools. No middlemen. No unnecessary jargon. No projects that never end.
About.missionCardP1: Every project starts with a simple question: what will change in your business once this is done? If we can’t answer that clearly, it isn’t worth building.
About.missionCardP2: We build software, organize the cloud, automate processes, and protect information with the same standard: the result has to show up in the day-to-day of the people who work with you.
About.valueDesc1: We don’t bolt on technology because it’s trendy. Every proposal comes from a real, measurable business problem.
About.valueDesc2: We work with leadership and with the people who use the systems every day. No unnecessary jargon.
About.valueDesc3: We measure success in hours saved, errors reduced, and better-informed decisions.
About.valueDesc4: We start small, validate, and grow alongside your business. No over-design, no over-engineering.
About.ctaDescription: Tell us what you want to improve and we’ll propose a concrete first path in a 30-minute call.

UseCases.metaDescription: Real scenarios where Techbox applies software, cloud, automation, cybersecurity, and data to solve concrete problems at SMBs.
UseCases.description: Each case combines several of our services depending on the problem. They’re not promises: they’re the kind of projects we run.
UseCases.ctaDescription: Book a call and let’s chat. Chances are we’ve already solved something similar — or we’ll design it together from scratch.

Contact.metaDescription: Reach out and book a no-strings consultation. We reply within 1 to 2 business days.
Contact.description: Tell us what you want to solve or improve. We reply within 1 to 2 business days with clear next steps.
Contact.expect2: We review your case and propose next steps

ContactForm.successBody: We’ll reply within 1 to 2 business days from {email}. If it’s urgent, message us on WhatsApp.
ContactForm.labelMessage: What do you want to solve?
ContactForm.placeholderMessage: E.g.: we want to automate post-sale follow-up. Today we do it in Excel and we keep losing customers.
ContactForm.errorBody: We couldn’t send the message. Try again or {whatsappLink}.
ContactForm.privacy: We only use your data to reply. We won’t add you to any mailing list.

Blog.metaDescription: Practical articles on automation, cloud, cybersecurity, and data for SMBs. Written by the Techbox team.
Blog.description: We write about automation, cloud, cybersecurity, and data from the trenches. No fluff, no unnecessary jargon.
Blog.ctaTitle: Want to see a specific topic?
Blog.ctaDescription: Drop us a line and we’ll add it to the list. We answer real questions that come from SMBs.

BlogPost.ctaDescription: Book a 30-minute call and let’s chat about how to apply it to your company.

Cta.defaultTitle: Tell us what you want to solve
Cta.defaultDescription: 30 minutes by video call. We come out with a concrete first idea on how to tackle it — not a sales pitch.

NotFound.title: We lost that page
NotFound.description: The link might be broken or we may have moved the content. From here you can go back to the home page or check out all our services.

ServiceSRE.metaTitle: SRE and Cloud Engineering on GCP and Kubernetes
ServiceSRE.metaDescription: Fractional SRE specialized in GCP, Kubernetes, and Istio for companies with digital product. 11+ years of experience, CKA and ICA certifications. Costa Rica and LatAm.
ServiceSRE.ogTitle: SRE and Cloud Engineering on GCP and Kubernetes | Techbox
ServiceSRE.ogDescription: Fractional SRE with CKA and ICA. Specialized in GCP, GKE, and Istio for SaaS, fintechs, and companies scaling microservices.
ServiceSRE.heroLead: Enterprise-grade reliability for your digital product, without hiring a full team. Fractional SRE specialized in GCP, GKE, and Istio.
ServiceSRE.daily4: CI/CD with Jenkins and Argo CD
ServiceSRE.diffsDescription: Generic cloud is for getting started. When your product grows — microservices, Kubernetes, multiple regions, compliance — you need someone with real experience operating production at scale. Not a generalist, a specialist.
ServiceSRE.diff1Desc: Not generalists who dabble in everything. We run GCP and Google Kubernetes Engine as our primary focus.
ServiceSRE.diff2Desc: One of the few professionals in LatAm with the CNCF Istio Certified Associate credential.
ServiceSRE.diff3Desc: Hands-on SOC2 and PCI running production for a Fortune 500 financial. Not theory.
ServiceSRE.diff4Desc: You pay only for the hours you need. No headcount, no long onboarding, no payroll overhead.
ServiceSRE.plansDescription: Three levels of monthly engagement. If you need something different, we can shape a custom plan.
ServiceSRE.planEssentialDesc: Professional supervision for infra that is already stable.
ServiceSRE.planEssentialF5: Mon–Fri support during CR business hours
ServiceSRE.planEssentialIdeal: Teams with stable infra that need professional oversight.
ServiceSRE.planStandardDesc: Active reliability for product in production.
ServiceSRE.planStandardIdeal: SaaS and startups with product in production.
ServiceSRE.planProIdeal: Companies scaling microservices or with strict compliance.
ServiceSRE.oneOffsDescription: Not ready for a monthly engagement yet? These services are project-based.
ServiceSRE.auditDesc: Review of cost, reliability, and security on your GCP account. Includes a PDF with prioritized findings and a 90-day plan. No commitment.
ServiceSRE.meshDesc: Assessment for companies considering Istio or Linkerd. Analysis of the current stack and an implementation roadmap.
ServiceSRE.turnkeyDescription: Closed projects with defined scope, timeline, and deliverables.
ServiceSRE.stackDescription: Tools I run in production and verifiable certifications that back the practice.
ServiceSRE.certsHelp: Click any badge to verify the credential on Credly.
ServiceSRE.fitDescription: We’d rather lose a client up front than deliver something outside our specialty.
ServiceSRE.fitYes1: B2B SaaS with product in production
ServiceSRE.fitYes3: Startups that migrated to GCP and need governance
ServiceSRE.fitYes4: Software houses needing a cloud specialist for their projects
ServiceSRE.fitYes5: Companies with compliance requirements (SOC2, PCI, local regulation)
ServiceSRE.fitNoCloudBefore: Companies that aren’t in the cloud yet → we recommend starting with our
ServiceSRE.fitNo24x7: Operations that require dedicated 24/7 on-call → you need an in-house team or an MSP.
ServiceSRE.fitNoStack: Stacks outside our specialty: Azure as primary, deep AWS, or pure on-premise.
ServiceSRE.finalCtaTitle: Is your infrastructure starting to feel too big for one person? Let’s talk.
ServiceSRE.finalCtaDescription: 90 minutes by video call. We come out with a PDF of prioritized findings and a 90-day plan, no commitment.
